methods.name: calendar.get
methods.description: Retrieve a calendar by ID. Returns the calendar object.

params.name: id
params.description: ID of calendar to fetch

methods.name: calendar.set
methods.description: Create or update a calendar. Returns the ID of the calendar.

params.name: calendar
params.description: Calendar object to create or update

params.name: events
params.description: Array of event IDs to add to the calendar

params.name: color
params.description: Hex color code for the calendar

params.name: timezone
params.description: Timezone for the calendar

params.name: is_public
params.description: Whether the calendar is public

methods.name: calendar.delete
methods.description: Delete a calendar by ID. Returns true if successful.

params.name: id
params.description: ID of calendar to delete

methods.name: calendar.exist
methods.summary: Check if a calendar exists by ID
methods.description: Check if a calendar exists by ID. Returns true or false.

params.name: id
params.description: ID of calendar to check

methods.name: calendar.list
methods.description: List all calendars. Returns an array of calendar objects.

Base.description: Base properties inherited by all model objects

color.description: Hex color code for the calendar

registration_desks.description: IDs of registration desks for tracking invitees

is_all_day.description: Whether this is an all-day event

color.description: Hex color code for the event

is_template.description: Whether this is a template event

admin.description: Whether user can manage the event

EventDoc.title: EventDoc
EventDoc.description: A document linked to an event

is_archived.description: Whether the chat group is archived

content.example: Hello everyone! How is the project going?

fs_files.description: File system item IDs attached to message

mentions.description: User IDs mentioned in the message

user_id.description: ID of the user who reacted

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp when reaction was added

message.example: Here's the weekly project update with current progress and next steps.

to.description: IDs of recipients in this send attempt

cc.description: IDs of CC recipients in this send attempt

fs_files.description: File system item IDs associated with project

start_date.description: Unix timestamp for project start date

end_date.description: Unix timestamp for project end date

description.example: Tasks that need to be started

is_done.description: Whether this swimlane represents completed work

issues.description: Issue IDs associated with this milestone

assignees.description: IDs of users assigned to this issue

reporter.description: ID of user who reported the issue

fs_files.description: File system item IDs attached to issue

white_list_accepted.description: User IDs from whitelist who have been accepted

accepted_by.description: ID of user who accepted the registration

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp when registration was submitted

timestamp_acceptation.description: Unix timestamp when registration was accepted
